codeReview.summary: The current worktree satisfies the section-map/payload contract: SectionMap preserves directory order with sequential indices, read_section_payloads fails closed on bounds errors without partial results, and regression coverage exercises zero-section, zero-size, truncated-directory, out-of-bounds, and non-monotonic-offset cases.
